category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Angola EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入安哥拉：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入安哥拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Angola IANORQ conformity and standards expectations, IRSEA / ENDE electricity-sector coordination, IEC 61851 safety and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, 220 / 380 V 50 Hz grid fit, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与安哥拉IANORQ合格评定及标准预期、IRSEA / ENDE电力行业协调、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC证据、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、220 / 380 V 50 Hz电网适配，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與安哥拉IANORQ合格評定及標準預期、IRSEA / ENDE電力行業協調、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC證據、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、220 / 380 V 50 Hz電網適配，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Angola, the practical gaps are not a mature, published EVSE-specific rulebook but the market-access and project gates around IANORQ conformity/import review, IEC-based safety and EMC evidence, IRSEA electricity-sector oversight, ENDE distribution-grid coordination, and connector conversion from China GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 where Angola projects follow the international IEC direction. Angola operates on a 220 / 380 V, 50 Hz grid, close to China's nominal 220 / 380 V, 50 Hz baseline, but project voltage tolerance, earthing, protection, metering, load capacity, and commissioning still require local confirmation. GB/T-only chargers are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and need hardware, cable, labeling, and communication-stack changes before they can be treated as Angola-ready.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入安哥拉时，实务差距并非一个已成熟公开的EVSE专门规则体系，而是IANORQ合格评定/进口审查、IEC体系安全及EMC证据、IRSEA电力行业监管、ENDE配电网协调，以及在安哥拉项目采用国际IEC方向时从中国GB/T 20234转换为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口等准入和项目门槛。安哥拉电网为220 / 380 V、50 Hz，接近中国220 / 380 V、50 Hz名义基线，但项目电压容差、接地、保护、计量、负荷容量和调试仍须本地确认。仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩与IEC 62196车辆接口物理不兼容，须完成硬件、电缆、标签和通信栈变更后，才可作为面向安哥拉的方案。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入安哥拉時，實務差距並非一個已成熟公開的EVSE專門規則體系，而是IANORQ合格評定/進口審查、IEC體系安全及EMC證據、IRSEA電力行業監管、ENDE配電網協調，以及在安哥拉項目採用國際IEC方向時從中國GB/T 20234轉換為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口等准入和項目門檻。安哥拉電網為220 / 380 V、50 Hz，接近中國220 / 380 V、50 Hz名義基線，但項目電壓容差、接地、保護、計量、負荷容量和調試仍須本地確認。僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁與IEC 62196車輛接口物理不兼容，須完成硬體、電纜、標籤和通訊棧變更後，才可作為面向安哥拉的方案。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IANORQ scope determination, IRSEA approval, ENDE grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Angola conformity assessment rules, IEC standard editions, IRSEA / ENDE project requirements, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IANORQ适用范围裁定、IRSEA批准、ENDE并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行安哥拉合格评定规则、IEC标准版本、IRSEA / ENDE项目要求及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IANORQ適用範圍裁定、IRSEA批准、ENDE併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行安哥拉合格評定規則、IEC標準版本、IRSEA / ENDE項目要求及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
